meta.title: HSE Construction — CDM Health & Safety File
meta.subtitle: Project handover register, Tower B fit-out
meta.author: Principal Designer
meta.deid_notice: All personnel are referred to by role label. Identifiers were pseudonymised before drafting; the re-identification key is held separately and is not part of this document.

sections.text: This Health & Safety File records residual hazards handed to the building's future maintenance and refurbishment duty-holders (CDM Regulation 12). Each entry names the element, its location, the residual hazard, and the responsible owner.

rows: Work at height — no permanent edge protection
sections.caption: CDM H&S File — element / location / residual hazard / owner

rows.title: Fragile atrium roof
rows.description: Glazing is non-load-bearing; cleaning access needs a documented safe system of work.

rows.title: Presumed asbestos in risers
rows.description: Duct lagging in risers 3 and 5 is presumed to contain asbestos pending survey.

rows.control: Specify a permanent edge-protection and anchor system at next refurbishment
Asbestos management plan + survey before any riser disturbance
Permit-to-work for all roof and confined-plant access

rows.action: Commission a refurbishment-and-demolition asbestos survey of risers 3 and 5
Design permanent fall protection for the atrium-roof cleaning route

sections.text: No work on riser lagging may proceed until the asbestos survey is complete and the management plan is in force.
